headline_seed: Eight feared dead after US Air Force B-52 bomber plane crashes in California - BBC
draft_text:
#BreakingMews A U.S. Air Force B-52 crashed at Edwards AFB Monday at 11:20 a.m. Eight were aboard; officials say the crash "was not survivable." NBC News and BBC News both confirm the aircraft was on a routine test mission.

And that's the mews.
